widget.caption: lom_prop_classification_keyword
widget.suggestionQuery: select factual_term_ident, CASE WHEN factual_term_synonyms IS NULL THEN factual_term_value WHEN array_length(factual_term_synonyms,1) = 1 THEN format('%s (%s)',factual_term_value, factual_term_synonyms[1]) ELSE format('%s (%s, %s)',factual_term_value, factual_term_synonyms[1], factual_term_synonyms[2]) END from edu_factual_term where (lower(factual_term_value) like ? OR lower(factual_term_synonyms[0]) like ? OR lower(factual_term_synonyms[1]) like ? OR lower(factual_term_ident) like ?) order by char_length(factual_term_value) limit 100

widget.caption: Zugriffsrechte
widget.bottomCaption: Welche Zugriffsrechte sollen Personen, für die dieses Objekt in edu-sharing freigegeben wird, auf die Pinnwand erhalten? Dieser Wert kann später in Curriculum für das Objekt geändert werden.

template.caption: dialog_upload_tab_tool_instance_general
dialog_upload_tab_tool_instance_provider
dialog_upload_tab_contributers
template.html:
{{ cb_contr_material }}
{{ cb_contr_metadata }}

property.name: ngsearchword
ngsearchword
